page.subtitle_html: You have two ways to check availability: fill out the form with model, shape and dimensions, or ask the assistant directly in natural language.

search_form.step_subtitle: Filter by carpet, shape and dimensions

chat.step_subtitle: Type your question in natural language and you'll get the answer in the panel on the right.
chat.placeholder: E.g. Do you have more than 30 ML of LUNA PLATINIUM?
chat.ai_initial: You'll see the assistant's response here once you launch a query. You can use the form or type in natural language.

results.title: Pieces available for your query
results.empty_initial: Launch a query to see available pieces.

alternatives.title: Alternatives if the customer accepts
alternatives.tier1_header: Tier I · same family, different design
alternatives.tier2_header: Tier II · different construction / similar tone

stock.one: We have **1 piece** that meets your query. The recommended one is **{ref}** (batch {lote}, {libre} m available).
stock.other: We have **{count} pieces** that meet your query. The recommended one is **{ref}** (batch {lote}, {libre} m available).

fabricacion.one: No finished stock, but there is **1 piece in production**. The closest is {lote} ({libre} m available, {fecha_txt}).
fabricacion.other: No finished stock, but there are **{count} pieces in production**. The closest is {lote} ({libre} m available, {fecha_txt}).

msg.fabricacion_alts_offer: Want me to also check **alternatives that we do have in stock**?
msg.todas_comprometidas_base: No finished stock and **all production in progress for this reference is already reserved**.
msg.todas_comprometidas_alts_offer: Want me to look for similar alternatives?
msg.sin_stock_base: No finished stock of **{ref}** and no production scheduled.
msg.sin_stock_alts_offer: Want me to look for similar references?

medida_invalida.header: ⚠️ The requested size is not possible in **{coleccion}**: {detalle}. Rolls come in **{anchos}** widths. Want me to look at another size that does fit?
medida_invalida.ancho_excede: the width **{ancho} m** exceeds the maximum roll of **{max_ancho} m**
medida_invalida.largo_excede: the length **{largo} m** exceeds the maximum piece of **{max_largo} m**
medida_invalida.default_detalle: doesn't fit in any roll combination

msg.necesita_color: You asked about **{coleccion}** but didn't tell me which colour. We have {n} colours available — tell me which (or click below).

lista_colores.one: In **{coleccion}** we have **1 colour**. Click any to see its stock.
lista_colores.other: In **{coleccion}** we have **{count} colours**. Click any to see its stock.
lista_colores.empty: I don't have any active colours registered in **{coleccion}**.

alts_followup.exists_no_stock_one: There is 1 alternative for **{ref}** but **none has stock** for your size.
alts_followup.exists_no_stock_other: There are {total} alternatives for **{ref}** but **none has stock** for your size.
alts_followup.with_stock_one_one: Here is the alternative for **{ref}**: **1 with stock** for your size.
alts_followup.with_stock_other_one: Here are {total} alternatives for **{ref}**: **1 with stock** for your size.
alts_followup.with_stock_other_other: Here are {total} alternatives for **{ref}**: **{con_stock} with stock** for your size.

errors.invalid_measures: Width and length must be numbers
